category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers entering the Laos market under DOSM, MEM, and EDL frameworks.

target_market_label.zh: 老挝（DOSM / 能源矿产部 / EDL）
target_market_label.zht: 寮國（DOSM / 能源礦產部 / EDL）

title.en: China-to-Laos LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入老挝：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入寮國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Laos DOSM mandatory conformity certification, MEM energy programme requirements, EDL grid specifications, and IEC-based technical standards versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification. Laos has no horizontal RoHS law; hazardous-substance status is mapped honestly as absent where applicable.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与老挝 DOSM 强制合格认证、能源矿产部（MEM）能效项目要求、EDL 电网规范及 IEC 技术标准的差距对照，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。老挝无横向 RoHS 法律；有害物质状态在适用处如实标注为缺失。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與寮國 DOSM 強制合格認證、能源礦產部（MEM）能效項目要求、EDL 電網規範及 IEC 技術標準的差距對照，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。寮國無橫向 RoHS 法律；有害物質狀態在適用處如實標註為缺失。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Laos DOSM certification requirements, MEM energy programme thresholds, EDL connection requirements, and any applicable MTPC radio-type approvals with qualified professionals and Laos government bodies before shipment or market placement. Regulatory frameworks in Laos are evolving; always check for the latest gazette notices and DOSM circulars.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及老挝政府部门核验现行老挝 DOSM 认证要求、能源矿产部（MEM）能效项目阈值、EDL 接入要求及适用的 MTPC 无线电型号核准。老挝监管框架持续演变；请务必查阅最新政府公报和 DOSM 通知。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及寮國政府部門核驗現行寮國 DOSM 認證要求、能源礦產部（MEM）能效項目閾值、EDL 接入要求及適用的 MTPC 無線電型號核准。寮國監管框架持續演變；請務必查閱最新政府公報和 DOSM 通知。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer entering the Laos market must obtain DOSM mandatory conformity certification for regulated goods; comply with IEC 60598-series and IEC 62560 safety standards as adopted or referenced by DOSM; meet EDL grid requirements at 230 V / 50 Hz (nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V grid); satisfy any MEM energy-efficiency programme requirements for commercial or government procurement; obtain MTPC type approval for wireless-enabled smart luminaires; and note that Laos has no horizontal RoHS law — hazardous-substance restrictions comparable to EU RoHS or CN RoHS do not currently exist in Laos. Transit logistics via Thailand or Vietnam must be factored into documentation and HS code selection.
answer_first.zh: 进入老挝市场的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：获得老挝标准计量局（DOSM）对受管制商品的强制合格认证；遵守 DOSM 采纳或参照的 IEC 60598 系列及 IEC 62560 安全标准；满足 EDL 电网要求（230 V / 50 Hz，额定电压与中国 220 V 电网不同）；符合能源矿产部（MEM）对商业或政府采购的能效项目要求；对具备无线功能的智能灯具取得 MTPC 型号核准；并注意老挝无横向 RoHS 法律——与欧盟 RoHS 或中国 RoHS 相当的有害物质限制目前在老挝不存在。过境物流（经泰国或越南）须纳入文件及 HS 编码选择统筹考虑。
answer_first.zht: 進入寮國市場的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：獲得寮國標準計量局（DOSM）對受管制商品的強制合格認證；遵守 DOSM 採納或參照的 IEC 60598 系列及 IEC 62560 安全標準；滿足 EDL 電網要求（230 V / 50 Hz，額定電壓與中國 220 V 電網不同）；符合能源礦產部（MEM）對商業或政府採購的能效項目要求；對具備無線功能的智能燈具取得 MTPC 型號核准；並注意寮國無橫向 RoHS 法律——與歐盟 RoHS 或中國 RoHS 相當的有害物質限制目前在寮國不存在。過境物流（經泰國或越南）須納入文件及 HS 編碼選擇統籌考慮。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official or best-available URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. DOSM certification scope, MEM energy programme thresholds, and EDL grid specifications must be re-verified against current Laos regulatory publications on each review cycle.
